title: November Rain
why_this_song: November Rain by Guns N' Roses (1991) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Do you need some time on your own?"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Don't you know I feel the same?"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "We've been through this such a long, long time"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "(You're not the only one)"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Don't you think that you need somebody?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "need" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "need" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When I look into your eyes
Ooh, everybody needs some time on their own
Don't you think that you need somebody?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I can see a love restrained
I know that you can love me

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "November Rain" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "November Rain" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "November Rain" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "November Rain"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Guns N' Roses one question about "November Rain", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Guns N' Roses sobre "November Rain", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
